def positive_repeated_locale_or_codec_lookup_in_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_locale_or_codec_lookup_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Locale or codec lookups repeat inside loops instead of being cached once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
